;LOAD ingatellentSettings.qmd
SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
    INSERT {
        property ~&197102514&~ savedOrientation: 0
    }
END SLOT
AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
TRAVERSE [[233681166222244]][.[[7083194890448]]=[[17607119099903567828]]]
REPLACE [[214644635174]] WITH {
	~&214644635174&~: {
            ~&5972376&~ (~&15793094956877902211&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~?.~&17607119099903567828&~*90 + ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0 ? "" : ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~?.~&17607119099903567828&~ ;
            } ~&6503784146&~ {
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0 ? ~&5971598&~.~&7712325863825955&~ : ~&5971598&~.~&8398087155484884339&~;
            }
        }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE [[428051690305612204]][.[[7083194890448]]=[[15793094956877902211.6503936152]]]
REPLACE [[9902384944378080159]] WITH {
        function ~&9902384944378080159&~() {
            ~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
        }
}
END TRAVERSE
REBUILD [[254480451320573660.495334332051582499]]
LOCATE AFTER STREAM / { /
INSERT {
     ~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[12881581101088955322]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[8399557527109078945]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[14934572181469780862]]#[[16551919589909039006]]
INSERT {
	property ~&197102514&~ savedOrientation: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation
        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
            ~&5972374&~: rotateIcon
		~&233721384511543&~ {
	            ~&6504027668&~: ~&16551919589909039006&~.~&214640173127&~
	            ~&499747351624466981&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&437492280418715944&~
	            ~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
	        }
		~&214646099849&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~
		~&7082729686082&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~

            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                ~&7083172477658&~: ~&"5100739812281664893&~
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&6504284228&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~
                ~&214622605608&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&8399340017235344933&~
            }
            ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
			~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation = (~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation + 270) % 360
			~&8399557527109078945&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)
		}
                ~&383135108587212173&~: {
			~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation = (~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation + 90) % 360
			~&8399557527109078945&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)
		} 
            }
        }
}
TRAVERSE [[14934572181469780862]]#[[16551919589909039006]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD [[233721384511543]]
LOCATE AFTER STREAM /~&499747351624466981&~:/
INSERT {
~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~ + 2*
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]] 
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]] > [[428051690305612204]][.[[7083194890448]]=[[14515220915283302886]]]
REBUILD [[8767030811170159252]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM /~&15857697271686765101&~/
INSERT {
~&5972376&~((~&7713446858344574&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0) || (!~&7713446858344574&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 90)) {
	~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~,~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
}
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[233745975898428]]
REBUILD [[6546484441017737853]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / } /
INSERT {
~&5972376&~(!~&14515220915283302886&~.~&12597697628854965581&~ && ((~&7713446858344574&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0) || (!~&7713446858344574&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 90))) {
	~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)                                            
}
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
